overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing the protagonist Geralt walking through a medieval coastal town. The character moves from a cobblestone village square through a stone tunnel, emerging to a foggy waterfront with a massive fortified city visible across the water, then proceeds through dock areas and along the shoreline.

events.description: approaching and entering dark stone archway tunnel

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the village square toward the stone archway entrance

notable_agents.action: woman in red dress sitting on stone steps
man in blue tunic walking past the camera

entered.detail: large stone tunnel entrance with wooden door to the side
wooden stall with fabric canopy and goods displayed
medieval stone buildings with wooden doors and timber framing
irregular cobblestone ground surface with grass growing between stones

segments.scene_description: The scene opens in a medieval village square with cobblestone ground. Geralt walks forward past a wooden market stall on the left and a woman sitting on steps to the right, approaching a dark stone archway tunnel entrance ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark stone passage through city wall

events.description: entering dark tunnel, visibility drops significantly
emerging from tunnel to bright overlook with water view

agents.ego_description: walking through the dark stone tunnel toward the bright exit

entered.detail: enclosed stone corridor with rough hewn walls and dim lighting
wooden plank ramp leading downward toward the tunnel exit
massive stone castle and city walls visible through the fog across the water
misty water surface visible through the tunnel exit

segments.scene_description: The camera moves through a dark, enclosed stone tunnel with rough walls. As the character approaches the exit, a bright foggy waterfront and a massive fortified city across the water become visible through the archway.

scene_state.functional_zone: open waterfront path with view of fortified city

events.description: slight turn to follow the curving waterfront path
passing underneath the large stone bridge structure

agents.ego_description: walking along the waterfront dirt path with the castle visible ahead

entered.detail: massive stone bridge with multiple arches spanning across the view
rustic wooden dock buildings with weathered planks
large archway of the bridge creating a tunnel-like passage ahead

segments.scene_description: Exiting the tunnel, the scene opens to a wide waterfront path with a massive fortified city visible through the fog across the water. The character walks along the dirt path, passing under a large stone bridge with multiple arches while wooden shacks line the right side.

turning right on wooden dock platform

agents.ego_description: walking through the foggy dock area under the bridge, passing wooden structures

white and beige cloths hanging on lines between wooden structures
stacked wooden barrels and crates near the dock buildings
calm water surface visible between wooden dock planks

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a foggy dock area underneath the stone bridge, supported by massive pillars. Wooden shacks line the path with hanging laundry visible, and a man sits near barrels to the right. The ground transitions to wooden planks as the character moves deeper under the structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: open waterfront promenade with stone buildings

events.description: exiting covered dock area back to open waterfront path

agents.ego_description: walking along the stone waterfront path with buildings on the left and water on the right

notable_agents.action: distant figure walking ahead along the waterfront path

entered.detail: row of medieval stone buildings with red tiled roofs along the waterfront
wooden pier structures extending into the water

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the covered dock area, the scene opens to a wide stone waterfront promenade. The character walks along the path with stone buildings featuring red roofs on the left and calm water with wooden docks on the right, continuing toward the distant figure ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a quaint medieval village square through a dark passage and out into a sprawling, foggy coastal waterfront. It begins on a cobblestone square, moving past a wooden market stall and a woman on some steps toward a dark stone archway. As the camera enters the enclosed tunnel, the rough stone walls frame a brightening exit that gradually reveals a massive fortified city shrouded in mist across the water. The scene then expands onto a dirt path beneath a multi-arched stone bridge, passing wooden shacks and hanging laundry before the ground transitions into wooden planks within the dock area. Finally, the camera emerges from the covered docks onto a wide stone promenade lined with red-roofed buildings and calm water, following the character toward a distant figure.
